title: RC4408 Farming Income and the AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Harmonized Guide - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4408 Farming Income and the AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Harmonized Guide
This guide provides information to self-employed farmers who participate in the Harmonized AgriStability and AgriInvest programs.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format rc4408-e.html PDF rc4408-25e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: PDF 2024 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-24e.pdf) 2023 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-23e.pdf) 2022 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-22e.pdf) 2021 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-21e.pdf) 2020 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-20e.pdf) 2019 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-19e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-18e.pdf) 2017 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-17e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-16e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-15e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-14e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-13e.pdf) 2012 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-12e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-11e.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-10e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-09e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-08e.pdf) 2007 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-07e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-06e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (rc4408-05e.pdf)

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- T1273 Statement A - Harmonized AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Information and Statement of Farming Activities for Individuals
- T1274 Statement B - Harmonized AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Information and Statement of Farming Activities for Additional Farming Operations
- T1175 Farming - Calculation of Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) and Business-use-of-home Expenses
- T1275 AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Additional Information and Adjustment Request
